hero.headline: TRANSPARENT ROOFING SOLUTIONS DELIVERED WITH SPEED
hero.subheadline: From repairs to replacements, installations to inspections — we bring precision, style, and quality craftsmanship to every project.

about.title: Welcome to Cali Roofing Solutions
about.description: We are a family-owned and operated business based in Southern California — bonded, insured, and licensed by the California State License Board. Our mission is to deliver top-quality roofing services at the BEST prices. No pushy salesmen — everything is done in-house. Trust is earned, not sold.
highlights: Bonded, insured & licensed by CA State License Board

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive roofing solutions for residential and commercial properties across Southern California

replacement.title: Roof Replacement
replacement.description: Complete roof replacements with lifetime warranty
features: Asphalt shingles, metal, and tile options
Most replacements completed in about a week

repair.description: Expert repair services for all roof types

commercial.title: Commercial Roofing

whyUs.title: The roofers your neighbors would recommend
whyUs.description: At Cali Roofing Solutions, we believe trust is earned, not sold. That's why we've built our family-owned reputation on one simple principle: treat every home like it's our own.

quality.title: Unmatched Craftsmanship
quality.description: Skilled, certified professionals delivering quality on every project.

transparency.title: Transparent Communication
transparency.description: Open lines and honest updates throughout your entire project.

integrity.title: Customer-Centric
integrity.description: Tailored services for your unique needs — no pushy salesmen.

experience.title: Respect Your Time
experience.description: We treat your home and schedule with the care they deserve.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: 5.0 out of 5 stars based on 82 Google reviews. See why homeowners across Southern California trust us.
